statement: An inside-negative root plasmalemma electrostatically excludes the PFAS anion (electrochemical factor e^N ~ 1e2), so passive diffusion alone cannot drive net uptake.

confidence.basis: qualitative judge: Both panelists agree the e^N~1e2 exclusion is a closed-form consequence of Tier-0 inputs (E_m, z), independently asserted by test_plant_module; it is a structural/formal property, not a fitted one, so the IOC signature holds.
